name: Outrageous Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Bacon, cooked crisp and crunchy
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients in a crock pot or large pot or Dutch oven.
2. Bring to a boil for 15 minutes, stirring every few minutes.
3. Simmer for at least 2 hours, stirring occasionally, so the mixture doesn't catch and burn.
4. This recipe yields about 1 1/2 quarts when doubled.
